description: Developed a comprehensive automotive marketplace application 'Wheel Deals' from scratch. Responsible for end-to-end delivery including mobile app, backend services, and server infrastructure.
achievements: Developed and deployed the full-featured 'Wheel Deals' mobile application
Architected and built a high-performance Spring Boot backend with enterprise security

Optimized database performance with complex PostgreSQL queries and Redis caching

description: Developed cross-platform mobile applications for the aerospace and defense sector, focusing on high-performance, secure, and scalable solutions for critical operations.
